instruction: Please write up something short for the River Street clinic outreach team and save it in /Community/Operations. It should help with the Friday partner calls by covering attendance, updates from each clinic, upcoming neighborhood events, and who owns each follow-up item. Title it "River Street Partner Call Notes".

rule_ref.rule_text: When he needs to create a reusable structure for recurring meetings, outreach, or planning workflows, he prefers starting from a template rather than a one-off document.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For anything I’ll repeat, I prefer making a template instead of a one-time document.

attributes.title: River Street Partner Call Follow-Up
attributes.content_brief: Summary sent after a recent Friday clinic partner call, including outreach updates and owner assignments.

attributes.title: River Street Tabling Debrief
attributes.content_brief: Quick notes on turnout, resident questions, and flyer counts from a neighborhood outreach table.

attributes.title: Staff Huddle Reminders
attributes.content_brief: One-page talking points for a regular team huddle covering attendance, announcements, and follow-ups.

attributes.title: Weekly Outreach Meeting Agenda
attributes.content_brief: Blank structure used for recurring outreach meetings with attendance, updates, event planning, and action items.
